svg.title: MarketPulse AI v2 architecture
svg.desc: Updated architecture showing auth layer, React frontend with pages, Flask API with rate limiting and APScheduler, persistent cache, ChromaDB RAG, parallel pipeline, multi-agent synthesis, scrapers, and Bright Data APIs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Login page work in MarketPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does user registration work in MarketPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does the main dashboard work in MarketPulse?')
sendPrompt('What does the AdminDashboard show in MarketPulse?')
sendPrompt('How does authentication work in MarketPulse?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the MarketPulse Flask API expose?')
g.text: rate-limited 60 req/hr · APScheduler auto-refresh 6h · cache.json persistent
